docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-09-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ROXAS, RITA AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS, ENOC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $35.00 SERVED MAR-12-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS, ENOC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2012 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROXAS, RITA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SANTOS, ENOC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 5/10/12 TO DEFENDANT ENOC SANTOS, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING GRANTED, PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-09-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-09-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROXAS, RITA
